summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The JPMorgan BetaBuilders Emerging Markets Equity ETF (BBEM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of large- and mid-capitalization companies in emerging markets. BBEM was launched on May 10, 2023 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
infoTable: Morningstar Emerging Markets Target Market Exposure Index

holdings.infoBox: BBEM is an equity ETF with a total of 1489 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 14.14%, Samsung Electronics at 6.87%, SK hynix at 6.38%, Tencent Holdings at 2.79%, and Alibaba Group Holding at 1.97%.
